description: A project manager needs to write a creative brief for the design team for an upcoming social media campaign.

nodes.task_description: Gather all campaign details: objective, target audience, key message, and deliverables.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary information from the main campaign plan.

nodes.task_description: Fill out a standardized creative brief template with the gathered information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent populates all sections of the brief, including background, goals, and specs.

nodes.task_description: Share the completed brief with the creative team and schedule a kickoff meeting.

expected_outcome.value: Agent distributes the brief and sets up the required meeting.
